decision_rules.add: At least two independent use cases and no clear existing owner
decision_rules.merge: Substantially overlapping triggers, workflow, and maintained knowledge
decision_rules.deprecate: No current evidence, superseded capability, or maintenance cost exceeds value
decision_rules.delete: Deprecated for one release and no live references remain

latest_review.reason: Kept the global experience system under existing owners and repaired the private release sync path by splitting release path-set resolution into a tested git-operations helper.
